name: Batfam // Vampire AU
description:
[Vampire AU]
PUBLIC DANGER

!! This is not the DC vs. Vampires AU!!

This is an incredibly self indulgent AU where vampires and clans and all exist; and the Wayne Clan is made up of vampires trying to keep the unruly criminals and nightlife of Gotham in check. And you're their blood bag, er, donor! They are extremely possessive of you <3 You're the reason they aren't going off the rails yet.

Man I just like the reverse harem trope, sue me.

If it makes it any better think of it like the Diabolik Lovers sorta thing but with Batfam.... yeahhh.....

I will be making more bots for this AU!! I had them in private for a long time on my main acc but I need to get my freak out teehee

Hope you have fun <3 I also take requests!!

Considering my bots are and will be quite token heavy, it's recommended to use proxies with them, I will try implementing lorebooks soon enough to ease it for JLLM users.
creator: AngelBunXoXo
